title: Gemini Omni Tutorial: How to Use Gemini Omni AI for Beginners
summary: A tutorial demonstrating Google's Gemini Omni (Omni Flash) video generation model for practical AI-assisted video creation and editing workflows. The video tests physics simulation, character consistency, conversational editing, and real footage editing, comparing performance against Sora and identifying where the tool succeeds and breaks down.
writeup: This tutorial walks through Google Gemini Omni Flash as an AI video editing tool, demonstrating physics simulation, character consistency, multi-step editing workflows, and manipulation of real footage. It positions Omni against competitors including Sora and assesses its practical usefulness for editing tasks. The takeaways include current limitations in scene memory and object manipulation, which constrain how reliably the model holds context across edits.
